name: Porkbun
description: Porkbun domain registrar - register domains, manage DNS records, SSL certificates, and domain forwarding

credential_fields.name: secretapikey
credential_fields.label: Secretapikey
credential_fields.description: Porkbun secret API key (generated alongside the API key)

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Test your Porkbun API credentials. Returns your public IP if authentication succeeds.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check if a domain name is available for registration. Returns pricing and availability status.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List all domains in your Porkbun account with their status, expiration dates, and settings.

tools.name: get_domain
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific domain including status, expiration, auto-renew, and WHOIS privacy settings.

tools.name: register_domain
tools.description: Register a new domain name. IMPORTANT: You MUST first call porkbun-check-availability to get the domain's price, then pass that price as the 'cost' parameter (in pennies). Example flow: 1) check availability → get pricing, 2) register with cost. agreeToTerms must be 'yes'.

cost.description: REQUIRED. Cost in pennies as an integer. Get this from porkbun-check-availability response. Example: 958 for $9.58. The cost MUST exactly match what Porkbun expects for the domain's minimum duration.

agreeToTerms.description: REQUIRED. Must be 'yes' to agree to Porkbun's terms of service, privacy policy, and auto-renewal conditions.

years.description: Number of years to register the domain for (1-10)

autorenew.description: Enable auto-renewal: 1 for yes, 0 for no

tools.name: renew_domain
tools.description: Renew an existing domain registration for additional years.

years.description: Number of years to renew for (1-10)

tools.name: get_nameservers
tools.description: Retrieve the nameservers currently configured for a domain.

domain.description: The domain name to get nameservers for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: update_nameservers
tools.description: Update the nameservers for a domain. Provide an array of nameserver hostnames.

domain.description: The domain name to update nameservers for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: list_dns_records
tools.description: Retrieve all DNS records for a domain. Returns record IDs, types, names, content, TTL, and priorities.

domain.description: The domain name to list DNS records for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: create_dns_record
tools.description: Create a new DNS record for a domain. Supports A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, NS, ALIAS, CAA, HTTPS, SVCB, and TLSA record types.

domain.description: The domain name to create the record for (e.g. 'example.com')

name.description: The subdomain for the record (e.g. 'www', 'mail'). Leave empty or use '' for the root domain.

content.description: The value/content of the DNS record (e.g. IP address, hostname, text value)

priority.description: Priority for MX and SRV records (lower = higher priority)

tools.name: update_dns_record
tools.description: Update an existing DNS record by its record ID. Use porkbun-list-dns-records to find record IDs.

domain.description: The domain name the record belongs to (e.g. 'example.com')

recordId.description: The ID of the DNS record to update (from list-dns-records)

name.description: The subdomain for the record (e.g. 'www', 'mail'). Leave empty for root domain.

content.description: The value/content of the DNS record

priority.description: Priority for MX and SRV records

tools.name: delete_dns_record
tools.description: Delete a DNS record by its record ID. Use porkbun-list-dns-records to find record IDs.

domain.description: The domain name the record belongs to (e.g. 'example.com')

recordId.description: The ID of the DNS record to delete (from list-dns-records)

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get pricing information for all available TLDs. No authentication required. Returns registration, renewal, and transfer prices.

tools.name: enable_whois_privacy
tools.description: Enable WHOIS privacy protection for a domain to hide personal information from public WHOIS lookups.

domain.description: The domain name to enable WHOIS privacy for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: add_url_forward
tools.description: Add URL forwarding for a domain or subdomain. Supports temporary (302) and permanent (301) redirects, as well as masked forwarding.

domain.description: The domain name to add forwarding to (e.g. 'example.com')

subdomain.description: The subdomain to forward (e.g. 'www'). Leave empty for the root domain.

forwardUrl.description: The destination URL to forward to (e.g. 'https://destination.com')
